title: Ensure that the admission control plugin AlwaysAdmit is not set

input_row.title: Ensure that the admission control plugin AlwaysAdmit is not set
input_row.rationale: Setting admission control plugin AlwaysAdmit allows all requests and do not filter any requests. The AlwaysAdmit admission controller was deprecated in Kubernetes v1.13. Its behavior was equivalent to turning off all admission controllers.
input_row.audit: Run the following command on the Control Plane node: ps -ef | grep kube-apiserver Verify that if the --enable-admission-plugins argument is set, its value does not include AlwaysAdmit .
input_row.remediation: Edit the API server pod specification file /etc/kubernetes/manifests/kube- apiserver.yaml on the Control Plane node and either remove the --enable-admission- plugins parameter, or set it to a value that does not include AlwaysAdmit .
input_row.impact: Only requests explicitly allowed by the admissions control plugins would be served.
input_row.default_value: AlwaysAdmit is not in the list of default admission plugins.

step1_initial_assessment:
**AUDIT APPROACH:** Automated

**PROGRAM NAME:** k8s_api_server_admission_plugins_required_set

**AUTOMATION DETAILS:**
- Use the Kubernetes API to check the configuration of the API server.
- The specific command to retrieve the API server configuration is:
  ```bash
  kubectl get pods -n kube-system -l component=kube-apiserver -o jsonpath='{.items[*].spec.containers[*].args}'
  ```
- This command will return the arguments passed to the kube-apiserver container, including the `--enable-admission-plugins` flag.
- The expected configuration should not include `AlwaysAdmit` in the list of admission plugins.
- Pass/Fail criteria:
  - **Pass:** The `--enable-admission-plugins` argument does not contain `AlwaysAdmit`.
  - **Fail:** The `--enable-admission-plugins` argument includes `AlwaysAdmit`.
